subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Eternity proclaims: O My handmaiden and daughter of My handmaiden! All servants and handmaidens are especially privileged in this Day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان قدم میفرماید ای کنیز من و فرزند کنیز من جمیع عباد و اماء را مخصوص امروز
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual transformation
